page_content: TLPL450 Advanced World Language Methods and Technology (3 Credits) Teaches advanced best practices for effective world language instruction. Topics include: using authentic assessment and materials, applying national standards, teaching writing and culture, motivating students, providing strategy instruction, infusing technology, preparing for PreK-12 employment, and creating a professional portfolio. Prerequisite: TLPL445. Corequisite: EDCI438. Restriction: Must be in Secondary Educ: Foreign Languages program; and minimum cumulative GPA of 2.75. Or permission of EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department. Credit Only Granted for: EDCI433, EDCI688A, TLPL450 or TLPL696. Formerly: EDCI433.
